data.title: Analysts: New York gold futures may enter a consolidation phase
data.description: Joseph Chai, an analyst at RHB Retail Research, said that based on the daily chart, COMEX gold futures may have entered a consolidation phase. Thursday's bearish trend in gold futures confirms that gold prices have formed strong resistance at $3,700 per ounce. The relative strength index suggests that the commodity's bullish momentum has slowed. Therefore, gold futures may pull back to the rising 20-day simple moving average. (Jinshi)

data.title: Binance Alpha will list Dill (DL) with a minimum of 200 points.
data.description: Binance Alpha will list Dill (DL) on September 19, 2025, at 7:30 PM (UTC+8). Once trading opens, users with at least 200 Alpha Points will be eligible to claim a 5,000 DL airdrop on a first-come, first-served basis. The minimum point threshold will decrease by 15 points every hour for any outstanding offer. Claims require 15 Alpha Points and must be confirmed within 24 hours; otherwise, the claim will be forfeited.

data.title: PayPal Expands Stablecoin PYUSD to Nine More Blockchains via LayerZero
data.description:
PayPal expands its U. S. dollar stablecoin PYUSD to nine more blockchains through LayerZero, boosting its supply and adoption across the crypto economy.

The post PayPal Expands Stablecoin PYUSD to Nine More Blockchains via LayerZero first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/09/19/paypal-expands-stablecoin-pyud-layerzero/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=paypal-expands-stablecoin-pyud-layerzero

data.title: Michigan Lawmakers Advance Bill to Allocate State Funds Into Bitcoin
data.description:
Michigan has revived a bill to allocate up to 10% of state funds into Bitcoin and crypto assets, pursuing Bitcoin reserve strategy.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/michigan-lawmakers-advance-bill-to-allocate-state-funds-into-bitcoin/

data.title: Whale Activity in SOL Market Raises Interest
data.description: According to TechFlow, on September 19, monitoring by Lookonchain revealed that the whale known as HsYrgw made another significant move in the SOL market. The whale purchased 11,233 SOL tokens, valued at approximately $2.75 million. This follows a previous transaction a week earlier, where the whale withdrew 101,974 SOL tokens from a centralized exchange (CEX), amounting to roughly $16 million. The activity has drawn attention to the whale's strategic maneuvers in the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Binance Alpha to List Ark of Panda (AOP) With Exclusive Airdrop on September 19
data.description: Key Takeaways:Binance Alpha will list Ark of Panda (AOP) on September 19, 2025, at 20:00 (UTC+8).Users with at least 200 Binance Alpha Points can claim an airdrop of 1,280 AOP tokens.The points threshold decreases by 15 points every hour until the event ends.Binance Alpha Announces Ark of Panda (AOP) ListingBinance Alpha confirmed it will be the first platform to list Ark of Panda (AOP), with Alpha trading scheduled to open on September 19, 2025, at 20:00 (UTC+8).To celebrate the listing, the platform is launching an exclusive airdrop event for eligible Alpha participants.How to Claim the AOP AirdropUsers must hold at least 200 Binance Alpha Points to participate.Eligible users can claim 1,280 AOP tokens on a first-come, first-served basis.The points threshold will decrease by 15 points every hour until the airdrop event ends.Claiming the reward consumes 15 Alpha Points.Users must confirm their claim within 24 hours on the Alpha event page, or the airdrop will be forfeited.

data.title: Bullish Bets Rise On Crypto Exchange 'Bullish'
data.description:
After a blockbuster IPO last month, crypto-exchange Bullish turned the corner, swinging to a profit in its first earnings report since going public. The firm reported a profit of $93 million, or 93 cents per share, for the June quarter, compared to a loss of $116. 4 million, or $1.
source: https://www.blockhead.co/2025/09/19/bullish-bets-rise-on-crypto-exchange-bullish/

data.title: Yunfeng Financial appoints former Ant Group executive Jiang Guofei as chairman of its Web3 Development Committee
data.description: Jack Ma-backed Yunfeng Financial Group has appointed former Ant Group executive Jiang Guofei as Chairman of its Web 3 Development Committee. Jiang Guofei previously served as President of Ant Digital Technology Group, leading the fintech giant's blockchain initiatives. After joining Ant Group in 2017, he was instrumental in the company's launch of Trusple, a blockchain-based smart contract platform for cross-border trade. After leaving Ant in 2024, he served as Chief Scientist at the state-owned China Electronics Corporation. Yunfeng Financial describes Jiang Guofei as one of three key individuals representing the company's "strong Web 3 DNA and talent pool," along with Xiao Feng, Chairman and CEO of HashKey Group, and Liang Xinjun, co-founder of Fosun International. Both serve on Yunfeng as independent non-executive directors. (South China Morning Post)

data.title: CryptoQuant analyst: Declining risks for long-term cryptocurrency holders support continued market trend
data.description: CryptoQuant analyst Axel Adler Jr. wrote on the X platform that while the current market price is rising, the risk for long-term holders (LTH) continues to decline. This is because expensive short-term holders (STH) are gradually maturing and transferring into the LTH group, pushing up the LTH realized price. This has prevented a significant increase in LTH MVRV, thereby reducing normalized risk. He pointed out that this is a healthy profit reset and a good market structure, which means that the market trend may continue as new funds absorb the selling pressure of old holders.

data.title: Binance: JOJO exclusive TGE event participation threshold is 210 Alpha points
data.description: According to an official announcement, Binance announced that users with Alpha Points of 210 or more can participate in the JOJO TGE event through the Alpha event page. Participation in the event will cost 15 points.

data.title: Peel Hunt Predicts Further Federal Reserve Rate Cuts in 2025
data.description: According to BlockBeats, investment bank Peel Hunt anticipates that the Federal Reserve will implement an additional 25 basis point rate cut in 2025. The forecast suggests that the federal funds rate will reach 3.00% by the end of 2026.
